title: betula chinensis var. fargesii
intro: Betula chinensis var. fargesii, also known as Farges's birch, is a plant species within the birch family Betulaceae, characterized by its white bark, slender branches, and small leaves. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Betula chinensis var. fargesii include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis symptoms, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Betula chinensis var. fargesii is often used to make tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
